name: Polyfair Holdings Limited
summary: Polyfair Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the construction business in Hong Kong. It designs and provides fa√É¬ßade systems and curtain wall work solutions for residential and commercial buildings. The company offers various design and build services for various projects, such as developing designs, conducting structural calculations, preparing shop drawings, sourcing and procuring building materials, arranging for building material logistics and installation works, project management, and post-project completion services. It serves property developers and contractors from the private sector. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in North Point, Hong Kong. Polyfair Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of C.N.Y. Holdings Limited.
